title: If You Got It, Own It

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Yikes, this place is the real deal! I'm way out of
my element!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To explain why we're here, we have to go back a
little bit. It all began when Nishino Flower
approached Tosen Jordan for advice...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
So, I put a photo of my nails on Umatter, and
someone commented suggesting I make a
nail-themed packed lunch.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I thought that sounded fun... but I can't come up
with a good idea. I want to make something
stylish—what do you think?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... You want it to look glam for the photos,
yeah? How about these? I keep seeing them on
my feed.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, Japanese sweets! They'd look super cute in
the lunchbox!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
But... I've never made anything so highbrow
before...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh... Who said anything about eyebrows?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Anyways, if it's about sweets, I know just who to
ask.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Japanese sweets? Then I'd recommend a
workshop for beginners. The experts will guide
you through all the steps.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'm rather interested myself, actually. Would it be
all right if I tagged along when you go?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, totes. Can you handle the reservation, then?
You know way more about this stuff and all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
They also figured having a chaperone would be
preferable, which is the exact moment I happened
to pass by...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I can sense a solemn adherence to tradition and
ceremony. I think we'll have a great experience
making sweets.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I don't think I could be more out of place...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I-it's okay, we're in this together! Um... I think we
get to try some tea and sweets before the
workshop begins.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
A private room?! We're not gonna have to be all
prim and proper, are we?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I read a book on Japanese culture once that said
Japanese sweets go hand in hand with formal tea
ceremonies.

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Pardon my intrusion. We will now be preparing
your tea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A number of kimono-clad staff enter the room.
They place trays of traditional sweets before us
and begin preparing the tea.

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff A
text_block_list.text: Please, help yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? We're already eating?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, I think it's proper etiquette to finish the
sweets before the tea.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Yes, I read that as well. It was quite surprising.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
You know your stuff, huh, Flower? Help a girl out
here—I'm in way over my head!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I'd like your guidance too, if you don't mind. I've
studied tea ceremony, but I'm far from an expert.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ah, of course! B-but it's not like I have any formal
practice, so... I'm sorry if I get anything mixed up!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Man, you're so put together, Flower. Mad
respect, seriously.

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I admire how open-minded you all are.
Many people would find it difficult to ask
someone younger for help.

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, I admire how open-minded you all are.
Many people would find it difficult to ask
someone younger for help.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Was that a low-key compliment?
choice_data_list:
Of course! She's praising your willingness to
learn!

Of course! She's praising your willingness to
learn!

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Do pardon me for speaking out of turn. Please
make yourselves at home. It wouldn't be a worthy
experience if you couldn't relax and enjoy
yourselves.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, so, like, are selfies cool?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Psst, Jordan! That has to be against the—

text_block_list.name: Shop Staff A
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe. Yes, take as many photos as you'd like.
Nothing makes us happier than others
appreciating Japanese sweets and tea.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: M-me too! I want to take pictures of the sweets!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
That workshop was a very enriching experience. It
certainly helped broaden my perspective on
Japanese culture.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
For sure. It was cool trying something you
normally don't get to do.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Now I can use my knowledge about making
Japanese sweets to make cute decorations for my
packed lunches!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
If you need any tips with your nails, let me know,
yeah? I got you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The trio chatter excitedly on the way back,
sharing ideas for Nishino Flower's Umatter
photos. There's no doubt they'll turn out great.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All is silent but for the sound of a bamboo tea
whisk. I sneak a sideways glance and see Tosen
Jordan and Eishin Flash looking pained.

text_block_list.name: Jordan & Flash
text_block_list.text: Hnnnnngh!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ow, ow, ow! Sitting in seiza sucks! I can't feel my
legs!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Jordan, I'd hazard a guess that it's impolite to be
stretching like that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: C'mon, it's just us here.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Besides, I know you're totes numb too.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Hnnngh! P-please don't poke me!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Um, try leaving some space between your legs
and crossing your big toes. It helps to avoid going
numb.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Whoa, no kidding. That's way better! ♪

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
So this is how you're supposed to sit. As someone
without much experience, your advice is a
lifesaver. Thank you, Flower.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe, happy to help. But if it starts to hurt, you
can always just say "excuse me" and sit normally.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Man, I'm so glad we've got you here. Like, marry
me, girl!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: C-come on, you'll make me blush!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Flower, if you notice anything wrong with my
etiquette, please let me know.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text: Um, I don't think you have to worry about that.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
The staff have already left, so that's probably
their way of saying we can make ourselves at
home.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
What if they're just cutting us some slack after
seeing our horrible posture?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Gasp! That would be... a little embarrassing.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Meh, I say we thank them. Time to kick back and
relax.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I agree. Let's enjoy the tea and the sweets at our
own pace.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After we take our time savoring the tea and
sweets, we take part in the sweets-making
workshop. From beginning to end, everyone is all
smiles.
